upgrade.faq1A: Yes — cancel anytime from your dashboard. Your verified status stays active until the end of the billing period.
upgrade.faq2A: 100% free. No charges until after your trial ends. Cancel before day 14 and you won't be billed.
upgrade.faq3Q: What does the Verified Source badge mean?
upgrade.faq3A: It tells customers your business has been reviewed and confirmed as a legitimate peptide business by The Peptide Alliance team.
